mutations.name: abortQueuedMigrations
mutations.description: Clear all of a customer's queued migrations.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: success
returnFields.description: Did the operation succeed?.

mutations.name: abortRepositoryMigration
mutations.description: Abort a repository migration queued or in progress.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: success
returnFields.description: Did the operation succeed?.

returnFields.description: The owner scoping the reattributable data.

returnFields.description: The account which may claim the data.

returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: success
returnFields.description: Did the operation succeed?.

mutations.name: importProject
mutations.description: Creates a new project by importing columns and a list of issues/PRs.
mutations.deprecationReason: Projects (classic) is being deprecated in favor of the new Projects experience, see: https://github.blog/changelog/2024-05-23-sunset-notice-projects-classic/. Removal on 2025-04-01 UTC.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: project
returnFields.description: The new Project!.

mutations.name: revokeMigratorRole
mutations.description: Revoke the migrator role from a user or a team.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: success
returnFields.description: Did the operation succeed?.

mutations.name: startRepositoryMigration

objects.name: Mannequin
objects.description: A placeholder user for attribution of imported data on GitHub.

fields.name: avatarUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the GitHub App's public avatar.

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: The size of the resulting square image.

fields.name: claimant
fields.description: The user that has claimed the data attributed to this mannequin.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The mannequin's email on the source instance.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Mannequin object.

fields.name: login
fields.description: The username of the actor.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTML path to this resource.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL to this resource.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: A list of nodes.

fields.name: pageInfo
fields.description: Information to aid in pagination.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Identifies the total count of items in the connection.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: The reason the organization migration failed.

fields.name: id

fields.name: targetOrgName

fields.name: totalRepositoriesCount
fields.description: The total amount of repositories to be migrated.

fields.name: continueOnError

enums.name: MannequinOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which mannequins can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order mannequins why when they were created.

values.name: LOGIN
values.description: Order mannequins alphabetically by their source login.

enums.name: MigrationSourceType
enums.description: Represents the different GitHub Enterprise Importer (GEI) migration sources.

values.name: PENDING_VALIDATION
values.description: The migration needs to have its credentials validated.

values.name: PENDING_VALIDATION
values.description: The Octoshift migration needs to have its credentials validated.

values.name: POST_REPO_MIGRATION
values.description: The Octoshift migration is performing post repository migrations.

values.name: PRE_REPO_MIGRATION
values.description: The Octoshift migration is performing pre repository migrations.

values.name: REPO_MIGRATION
values.description: The Octoshift org migration is performing repository migrations.

enums.name: RepositoryMigrationOrderDirection
enums.description: Possible directions in which to order a list of repository migrations when provided an orderBy argument.

values.name: ASC
values.description: Specifies an ascending order for a given orderBy argument.

values.name: DESC
values.description: Specifies a descending order for a given orderBy argument.

enums.name: RepositoryMigrationOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which repository migrations can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order mannequins why when they were created.
